title: Survive the Winter
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack where you (with a custom map included) will have to survive the brutal cold after your train crashes in Siberia.
body:
Version 2.0 is out!

Survive the Winter is a relatively hard survival modpack focused on realism. You spawn in an infinite snowy region, where all biomes, once lush and green, are nothing but white, frozen over. You must survive with the tools that you have--and the heat that you have. Heat is an integral function of this modpack. If you let your temperature lower too far, you will eventually succumb to the frost. Raise it too much and you will overheat, ending the same way. The challenge will not be easy and you will most definitely be forced to make tough decisions in your bid to survive, but it is not impossible. Woolen outfits, ice skates and certain tools provide the warmth and security you will need to face the harsh reality of the frost, but how long will those last? At the end of the day, your objective through all of this is quite simple: survive the winter or die trying. ## Warning: The modpack is designed to work *with* a server side set up, which will be downloadable soon! ## Custom Map: The Modpack can be downloaded from 1.8.7.1 and the Custom map from 1.8.7 by scrolling down to the bottom of the page. 
Credits to all the mod developers who made this modpack possible:
